message:
chore(ci): regenerate gate reports after extension corpus update

- extension-conformance-test-plan.json: timestamp refresh (no content change)
- extension-entry-scan.json: add qualisero-background-notify/shared.ts and
  qualisero-safe-git/shared.ts sub-modules (+2 total_files, +2 high confidence)
- provider-canonical-id-table.json: bump total_aliases 41->42, add EOF newline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
